'''mazhumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kharza|kharza]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-zh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kharza|kharza]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mazhumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæzhimith|mæzhimith]] || [[word:mæzhimij|mæzhimij]] || [[word:mæzhimish|mæzhimish]] || [[word:mæzhimi|mæzhimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mazhuzhumuth|mazhuzhumuth]] || [[word:mazhuzhumuj|mazhuzhumuj]] || [[word:mazhuzhumush|mazhuzhumush]] || [[word:mazhuzhumu|mazhuzhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mazhumuth|mazhumuth]] || [[word:mazhumuj|mazhumuj]] || [[word:mazhumush|mazhumush]] || [[word:mazhumu|mazhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mazhufmuth|mazhufmuth]] || [[word:mazhufmuj|mazhufmuj]] || [[word:mazhufmush|mazhufmush]] || [[word:mazhufmuf|mazhufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mazhumuthu|mazhumuthu]] || [[word:mazhumuju|mazhumuju]] || [[word:mazhumushu|mazhumushu]] || [[word:mazhumuku|mazhumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mazhumuth|mazhumuth]] || [[word:mazhumuj|mazhumuj]] || [[word:mazhumush|mazhumush]] || [[word:mazhumu|mazhumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mazhumuthul|mazhumuthul]] || [[word:mazhumujul|mazhumujul]] || [[word:mazhumushul|mazhumushul]] || [[word:mazhumukul|mazhumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mazhumuthuthu|mazhumuthuthu]] || [[word:mazhumujuju|mazhumujuju]] || [[word:mazhumushushu|mazhumushushu]] || [[word:mazhumuku|mazhumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mazhumuthun|mazhumuthun]] || [[word:mazhumujun|mazhumujun]] || [[word:mazhumushun|mazhumushun]] || [[word:mazhumukun|mazhumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mazhumuthuoro|mazhumuthuoro]] || [[word:mazhumujuoro|mazhumujuoro]] || [[word:mazhumushuoro|mazhumushuoro]] || [[word:mazhumukuoro|mazhumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
